title: EVO-STIK Instantly Paintable Decorators Caulk White, Can be Overpainted Immediately, Won’t Crack or Discolour, Smooth Finish, 290ml
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Immediate Overpainting: This caulk can be overpainted immediately with water-based and synthetic paints, allowing you to achieve a fast, professional finish without waiting. It’s a time-saving solution for decorators.

Versatile Application: Suitable for most surfaces, this caulk doesn’t require a primer. Whether you’re filling fine cracks or gaps between walls, window frames, door frames, skirting boards, or window sills, it’s a reliable choice.
Non-Crack Technology: EVO-STIK Decorators Caulk Instantly Paintable uses non-crack technology, ensuring a super smooth finish. No worries about unsightly cracks or imperfections.
No Discolouration: Tested in conjunction with paint manufacturers, this caulk won’t cause paint discolouration. You’ll achieve a flawless result every time.
Content: 1 cartridge of EVO-STIK Instantly Paintable Decorators Caulk White 290ml. Coverage approx. 10m of a 6mm bead per cartridge.
description: EVO-STIK Decorators Caulk Instantly Paintable can be overpainted immediately with water based and synthetic paints to give a fast, smooth and professional finish to any decorating job while saving you time and money. It can be applied to most surfaces without the need for a primer, and because it has been tested in conjunction with paint manufacturers, it ensures there is no paint discolouration. It is ideal for filling fine cracks and gaps where movement can occur, such as between walls and window frames, door frames, skirting boards, window sills and architraves. Easy to apply and clean, EVO-STIK Decorators Caulk Instantly Paintable uses non-crack technology to give a super smooth finish to any job.
